Software Engineer, AI Solutions(Contract -12 Months) - job post

Electronic Arts

Hyderabad, Telangana

Hyderabad, Telangana

&nbsp;

Full job description

General Information

Locations: Hyderabad, Telangana, India
Role ID
215387
Worker Type
Temporary Employee
Studio/Department
CT - IT
Work Model
Hybrid

Description & Requirements

Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
Role Overview
As an AI Solutions Engineer, you will design and build product and platform capabilities across backend services, web applications, enterprise integrations, and AI-enabled workflows.
This role is a strong fit for someone who enjoys building internal products that combine structured workflows with intelligent analysis. You should be comfortable working across frontend, backend, APIs, integrations, and data-driven services while keeping usability, reliability, and trust front and center.
You will report to the Senior Manager, AI Solutions, and Insights.
Responsibilities
  • Build and maintain backend services and APIs that support AI-enabled workflows and operational automation.
  • Develop web application capabilities and user-facing workflows that make internal tools usable, reliable, and scalable.
  • Build integrations with internal products and enterprise platforms using structured APIs and secure service-to-service patterns.
  • Implement AI-enabled workflows such as retrieval, classification, summarization, and contextual analysis in a way that is reliable and understandable to end users.
  • Contribute to platform architecture, observability, reliability, security, and maintainability across services and applications.
  • Partner with AI, operations, product, and engineering teams to shape requirements and deliver production-ready capabilities.
Qualifications
  • 5+ years of professional software engineering experience.
  • Strong experience building scalable backend services, APIs, and data-driven applications.
  • Experience with frontend frameworks and libraries such as React or Angular.
  • Strong experience with backend languages such as Python or C#.
  • Experience with backend frameworks such as Django or ASP.NET Core.
  • Experience working with databases such as Postgres, MySQL, or Redis.
  • Experience building and deploying applications on Azure.
  • Experience with DevOps practices and tools including CI/CD, Docker, and Kubernetes.
  • Familiarity with AI-enabled workflows such as LLM-driven extraction, classification, retrieval, summarization, or human-in-the-loop review.
  • Solid understanding of UI/UX fundamentals and building software that is usable and trusted by real teams.
  • Experience designing software that is scalable, observable, secure, and maintainable.
What Success Looks Like
  • In the first few months, you will help strengthen and extend the current platform into more robust production-ready services and user experiences.
  • Over time, you will help deliver a scalable internal platform that connects AI capabilities with operational workflows, improves automation, and enables more intelligent support experiences across teams.
Who You Are
You are a product-minded engineer who can move comfortably between backend systems, frontend development, integrations, and AI-enabled workflows. You care about building reliable software, but you also care about making the output usable and trusted by real teams. You enjoy turning ambiguous operational pain points into practical product capabilities.



About Electronic Arts
We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.

We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.

Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.
